general_info.significance: Largest religious gathering in the world, held every 12 years at four locations in India.

emergency_routes: Dedicated lanes for ambulances and police

faq.question: What is the significance of Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Kumbh Mela is a major Hindu pilgrimage and festival that occurs every 12 years at four locations in India. It is believed that taking a holy dip in the sacred rivers during Kumbh Mela washes away sins and grants salvation.

faq.question: When and where will Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 be held?
faq.answer: Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 will be held in Nashik, Maharashtra, India, from January 13, 2025, to April 26, 2025.

faq.question: What are the main rituals performed during Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: The main rituals include Shahi Snan (Royal Bath), Pind Daan (ancestral offerings), Yagna (fire rituals), Satsang (spiritual discourses), and Katha (scriptural recitation).

faq.question: Which are the most important bathing dates in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025?
faq.answer:
The most auspicious bathing dates (Shahi Snan) in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 are:
- January 14, 2025 (Makar Sankranti)
- February 4, 2025 (Mauni Amavasya)
- March 10, 2025 (Mahashivratri)
- April 20, 2025 (Ram Navami).

faq.question: How can I reach Nashik for Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Nashik is well connected by rail, road, and air. The nearest airport is Nashik Airport, with major flights from Mumbai and Pune. Nashik Road Railway Station has trains from major cities. Buses and taxis are available from Mumbai, Pune, and other locations.

faq.question: Is there any entry fee for Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: No, there is no entry fee for attending Kumbh Mela. However, visitors may have to pay for accommodation, food, and transportation.

faq.question: What are the safety measures for crowd control at Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: The government deploys drones, AI-based surveillance, CCTV cameras, and additional police personnel for crowd management. Designated entry and exit points, barricades, and emergency lanes are also set up.

faq.question: Where can I find medical facilities during Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer:
Temporary hospitals, medical camps, and ambulances will be available throughout the Kumbh Mela site. Emergency contact numbers:
- Ambulance: +91-108
- Medical Helpline: +91-9876543210

faq.question: Are there any special accommodations for international tourists?
faq.answer: Yes, dedicated tent cities, guest houses, and hotels with multilingual support are available for international visitors. It's recommended to book in advance due to high demand.

faq.question: What are the COVID-19 or health guidelines for Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Visitors are advised to follow basic hygiene protocols, such as wearing masks in crowded areas, using hand sanitizers, and maintaining social distancing where possible. Health check-up booths will be set up at entry points.

faq.question: What is the significance of Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Kumbh Mela is a major Hindu pilgrimage and festival that occurs every 12 years at four locations in India. It is believed that taking a holy dip in the sacred rivers during Kumbh Mela washes away sins and grants salvation.

faq.question: When and where will Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 be held?
faq.answer: Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 will be held in Nashik, Maharashtra, India, from January 13, 2025, to April 26, 2025.

faq.question: What are the main rituals performed during Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: The main rituals include Shahi Snan (Royal Bath), Pind Daan (ancestral offerings), Yagna (fire rituals), Satsang (spiritual discourses), and Katha (scriptural recitation).

faq.question: Which are the most important bathing dates in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025?
faq.answer:
The most auspicious bathing dates (Shahi Snan) in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 are:
- January 14, 2025 (Makar Sankranti)
- February 4, 2025 (Mauni Amavasya)
- March 10, 2025 (Mahashivratri)
- April 20, 2025 (Ram Navami).

faq.question: How can I reach Nashik for Kumbh Mela?

faq.question: What is the significance of Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Kumbh Mela is a major Hindu pilgrimage and festival that occurs every 12 years at four locations in India. It is believed that taking a holy dip in the sacred rivers during Kumbh Mela washes away sins and grants salvation.

faq.question: When and where will Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 be held?
faq.answer: Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 will be held in Nashik, Maharashtra, India, from January 13, 2025, to April 26, 2025.

faq.question: What are the main rituals performed during Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: The main rituals include Shahi Snan (Royal Bath), Pind Daan (ancestral offerings), Yagna (fire rituals), Satsang (spiritual discourses), and Katha (scriptural recitation).

faq.question: Which are the most important bathing dates in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025?
faq.answer:
The most auspicious bathing dates (Shahi Snan) in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 are:
- January 14, 2025 (Makar Sankranti)
- February 4, 2025 (Mauni Amavasya)
- March 10, 2025 (Mahashivratri)
- April 20, 2025 (Ram Navami).

faq.question: How can I reach Nashik for Kumbh Mela?

faq.question: What is the significance of Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Kumbh Mela is a major Hindu pilgrimage and festival that occurs every 12 years at four locations in India. It is believed that taking a holy dip in the sacred rivers during Kumbh Mela washes away sins and grants salvation.

faq.question: When and where will Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 be held?
faq.answer: Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 will be held in Nashik, Maharashtra, India, from January 13, 2025, to April 26, 2025.

faq.question: What are the main rituals performed during Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: The main rituals include Shahi Snan (Royal Bath), Pind Daan (ancestral offerings), Yagna (fire rituals), Satsang (spiritual discourses), and Katha (scriptural recitation).

faq.question: Which are the most important bathing dates in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025?
faq.answer:
The most auspicious bathing dates (Shahi Snan) in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 are:
- January 14, 2025 (Makar Sankranti)
- February 4, 2025 (Mauni Amavasya)
- March 10, 2025 (Mahashivratri)
- April 20, 2025 (Ram Navami).

faq.question: How can I reach Nashik for Kumbh Mela?

faq.question: What is the significance of Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: Kumbh Mela is a major Hindu pilgrimage and festival that occurs every 12 years at four locations in India. It is believed that taking a holy dip in the sacred rivers during Kumbh Mela washes away sins and grants salvation.

faq.question: When and where will Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 be held?
faq.answer: Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 will be held in Nashik, Maharashtra, India, from January 13, 2025, to April 26, 2025.

faq.question: What are the main rituals performed during Kumbh Mela?
faq.answer: The main rituals include Shahi Snan (Royal Bath), Pind Daan (ancestral offerings), Yagna (fire rituals), Satsang (spiritual discourses), and Katha (scriptural recitation).

faq.question: Which are the most important bathing dates in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025?
faq.answer:
The most auspicious bathing dates (Shahi Snan) in Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 are:
- January 14, 2025 (Makar Sankranti)
- February 4, 2025 (Mauni Amavasya)
- March 10, 2025 (Mahashivratri)
- April 20, 2025 (Ram Navami).

faq.question: How can I reach Nashik for Kumbh Mela?
